description_long: This sports center is a large, multi-level building with a distinctive angular and curved architectural design, featuring a prominent sloped roof and a combination of flat and stepped sections. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some areas possibly clad in metal or composite panels. The building is set on a landscaped base with paved walkways and green areas surrounding it, suggesting integration with an urban environment. The roof includes a striking orange-red structural element, possibly a skylight or decorative feature, that adds visual interest and modern flair. Windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The overall style is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A large, modern sports center with angular and curved forms, a sloped roof, and horizontal window bands, set on a landscaped urban base.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance area, the sloped roof, and the orange-red roof feature, with landscaped surroundings visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the building's curved facade and stepped levels, with the roof's slope and orange feature more prominent.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the extended horizontal layout, additional window bands, and the continuation of the roof structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the angular geometry and the integration of the building with the paved and green base.
attribute_entrance_type: Main entrance with wide double doors, possibly glass, located at the front center; no revolving or sliding doors visible.
attribute_roof_structure: Sloped and partially flat roof with a prominent orange-red structural or decorative element; likely constructed from metal and composite materials.
attribute_window_arrangement: Horizontal bands of windows arranged in continuous rows along the facade, symmetrically aligned with some grouped sections.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with modernist influences, characterized by geometric forms, clean lines, and a mix of angular and curved elements.
